netapp_network_volumes_replications_titl: Sync volume(s) on another Enterprise File Storage service
netapp_network_volumes_no_selected_volum: To replicate, please select one or more volumes.
netapp_network_volumes_not_replications_: To sync volumes, you need to have at least one Enterprise File Storage service with a vRack connection in the same datacentre. Services exposed to the public cannot be used as targets and will soon be retired.
netapp_network_volumes_replications_desc: Each volume will be replicated individually in the target Enterprise File Storage service. You need to confirm synchronisation on the target services for each volume. The synced volumes will then be read-only. You can then promote to read/write from the list of volumes in the target service.
